title: Irresistible Love prevents opponent damage while active

card.rawText: Your opponent cannot inflict damage or play magic cards. During each player's turn, your opponent may roll 1 die. If the result is 1-3, this effect ends and this card is sent to your cemetery.

plan.title: Irresistible Love prevents opponent damage while active
plan.summary: Play Irresistible Love as a field card and verify the opponent cannot inflict damage while the field effect is active.

notes: Irresistible Love field text: your opponent cannot inflict damage while this effect is active.

steps: Attempt a damage-producing action by player_2.
Verify player_2 cannot inflict damage while the field effect remains active.

expectedAssertions.label: Irresistible Love is active on field

manualVerification: The damage lock ends only when the opponent succeeds on the 1-3 escape roll.
riskNotes: This fixture specifically checks damage prevention, not the separate magic-play restriction.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_039_irresistible_love-039-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
